turns.content:
📋 SUMMARY: Here's your Thursday, February 12th schedule.

🔍 ANALYSIS: Full day with 17 events — mix of work sessions, wellness, and personal time.

⚡ ACTIONS: Pulled live calendar via gcalcli.

✅ RESULTS:

| Time | Event |
|------|-------|
| 6:30 AM | Morning Routine |
| 7:00 AM | Walk |
| 7:15 AM | Work Session - Focus |
| 8:00 AM | [OPTIONAL] Data + AI = DataAI |
| 8:45 AM | Salsa Practice |
| 9:00 AM | R&I Initiative Sync |
| 9:00 AM | Work Session - Flex |
| 10:30 AM | Rehab |
| 10:45 AM | Workout |
| 12:00 PM | Lunch |
| 12:30 PM | Decompress |
| 1:30 PM | Walk |
| 2:00 PM | Personal Tasks |
| 3:00 PM | Project Time |
| 4:30 PM | Evening Prep |
| 5:00 PM | Dinner |
| 9:30 PM | Evening Routine |

📊 STATUS: It's currently ~7:00 PM — you're past dinner, heading toward evening routine at 9:30.

📁 CAPTURE: Calendar context refreshed live. Note the R&I Initiative Sync and DataAI meeting overlap at 9 AM.

➡️ NEXT: Evening routine at 9:30 PM. Anything you want to plan for tomorrow?

📖 STORY EXPLANATION:
1. Calendar context was outdated (222h old), so I pulled live data
2. 17 events spanning 6:30 AM to 9:30 PM
3. Morning block: routine, walk, focused work session
4. Mid-morning: optional DataAI meeting, salsa practice, R&I sync
5. Overlap: R&I Initiative Sync and Work Session - Flex both at 9:00 AM
6. Midday: rehab, workout, lunch, decompress
7. Afternoon: personal tasks and project time
8. Evening: you're currently between dinner and evening routine

⭐ RATE (1-10):

🗣️ Kaya: Seventeen events today. You're past dinner, evening routine at nine-thirty is next up.

               [--client-secret CLIENT_SECRET] [--noauth_local_server]
               [--config-folder CONFIG_FOLDER] [--noincluderc]
               [--calendar GLOBAL_CALENDARS]
               [--default-calendar DEFAULT_CALENDARS] [--locale LOCALE]
               [--refresh] [--nocache] [--conky] [--nocolor]
               [--lineart {fancy,unicode,ascii}]
               {init,list,search,edit,delete,agenda,agendaupdate,updates,conflicts,calw,calm,quick,add,import,remind,config,util} ...
gcalcli: error: argument command: invalid choice: 'today' (choose from init, list, search, edit, delete, agenda, agendaupdate, updates, conflicts, calw, calm, quick, add, import, remind, config, util)

tool_calls.name: Bash

params.command: pai-cli gcal agenda --no-started 2>&1 || pai-cli calendar today 2>&1
